description: Expected validation state for the mx_unam_apa7 sample project (UNAM posgrado, APA 7, ciencias biológicas)
notes: Sample UNAM posgrado thesis in Ciencias Biológicas, APA 7 style. Exercises: portada, resumen en español, abstract en inglés (both present), dedicatoria, agradecimientos with CONAHCYT/PAPIIT funding, índice, all required body sections (introducción through conclusiones), and references in APA style with 3 entries: IPCC report, Peterson book, Díaz 2019 Science article. Language: Spanish. Uses \% in LaTeX content for percentage signs.
